hold_mae_deg.description: HoldMAE — mean absolute encoder error during the settled hold phase

time_to_sp_s.description: T→SP — seconds from run start to first entry into the tolerance band

settling_time_s.description: T_s — seconds from run start to confirmed settled hold (no band exits through end of run)

hold_duration_s.description: Hold duration — seconds of confirmed settled hold from T_s to end of run

overshoot_pct.description: Overshoot — peak excursion past setpoint after first crossing, as % of initial step
